dialogueChunks.intro: Your actions during the crisis over the {quest_focus} shamed both rivals into reflecting on their behavior. They've come to a reluctant understanding.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} and {target_npc} won't be friends, but they've agreed to keep their competition constructive. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} settled: your example reminded them what actually matters when the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_is} real.
dialogueChunks.outro: You outperformed both of them without even trying to compete. That said more than any argument could, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: The dust has settled on the {quest_focus}, and one rival came out ahead. The loser is bitter, but the settlement has moved on.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} accepted the outcome, though it stung. {target_npc} earned their standing fairly, in part because you kept the {quest_threat} from making the whole contest meaningless. The {quest_stakes} found resolution, even if it's not perfectly clean.
dialogueChunks.outro: Someone had to win, someone had to lose. What matters is that the settlement survived it intact. Thanks to you, {player_name}.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something no one expected: {quest_ally} and {target_npc} have decided to work together. The crisis around the {quest_focus} forced them to see each other's strengths.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: What started as bitter competition over the {quest_stakes} became a partnership after they realized the {enemy_type} threat was bigger than either could handle alone. Your work against the {quest_threat} gave them the wake-up call they needed.
dialogueChunks.outro: From rivals to partners. The settlement is stronger for it, and you're the reason it happened, {player_name}.
